scripts.setup: git config core.hooksPath .githooks && echo 'Git hooks activated. You are protected from committing or pushing to main.'
scripts.web: npm run clean --workspace=apps/web && npm run dev --workspace=apps/web
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "global-api,app-api,web" --prefix-colors "blue,green,magenta" "npm run global-api" "npm run app-api" "npm run web"
